name: Code question
about: Ask about how the code in a chapter works

## Chapter and section

Which chapter and section is your question about?

## What you've tried

What did you do, and what happened? Paste the command, the relevant output, or the error message.

## What you're stuck on

A short, specific question. "How does X work?" is better than "I don't understand this chapter."
